status_detail: Site is nearly review-ready. All critical issues fixed. Remaining 3-point gap is from thin blog guides which are held pending Phase 32 Day 7 (Jun 25).
what_would_reach_90: If top 10-15 guides prove quality (Phase 32 Day 7 data) and remaining thin guides are removed from sitemap, score reaches 90+.
reason: Score 87/100. Do NOT request review until ≥90 and thin guide decision is resolved.
